steps.title: Match slopes (parallel lines)
steps.content:
Line $j$: $4x + 5y = 55$, slope $= -\tfrac{4}{5}$.

Line $k$: $24x + ry = 15$, slope $= -\tfrac{24}{r}$. For parallel: $-\tfrac{24}{r} = -\tfrac{4}{5} \Rightarrow r = 30$.

steps.title: Find $b$
steps.content:
Line $k$ is $24x + 30y = 15$. At $x = 0$: $30y = 15 \Rightarrow y = \tfrac{1}{2}$.

So $b = \tfrac{1}{2}$.

The answer is 1/2,0.5.
